title: Survive on Horror
description: The most scary modpack ever,try not scary on this modpack and get the most powerfull items to kill them
body:
![Survive On Horror](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be1b1e004fdca42246ef343541f7954d097330d9.png)


. ⚔️   In this modpack you can make weapons like shotguns, pistols, you can also make swords, axes, pickaxes from various types of materials and with these weapons you can kill the scary monsters

. 👾 Try to kill Mosters like Herobrine and cave dweller and try not to get scared by them, with the jumpscares and much more.

. ⚔️ The objective of the modpack is to try to get the best items possible to kill the scary monsters and try not to get scared by them.

. It is recommended to use the shaders that are already included in the modpack.

. 🤝   You can play with friends and get scared together, you just need to start the LAN and the IP will be in the chat.
If an error occurs, let us know that we'll attempt to fix it as soon as possible.
